headline: Olive Garden is making big menu changes diners will love
summary: Olive Garden is serving up some big changes this spring. On March 19, CEO Rick Cardenas told investors diners can expect to see GLP-1-friendly menu options and opportunities for free food in 2026. The comments came during Olive Garden’s parent company, Darden Restaurants’, Q3 FY2026 earnings call. ...
